VN-Index Linear Regression Forecasting & Backtest

Best model: Ridge | Test Sharpe: 1.25 | CAGR: 13.12% | Max Drawdown: -9.06%
Data range: 2000-07-28 to 2026-07-01. Strategy: long VN-Index when next-day predicted log return is above the one-way cost threshold; otherwise cash.
